creator: ganael.laplanche@martymac.com
text:
This patch fixes flightgear-aircrafts by updating the bluebird plane to version 6.4 (it is not a huge update, so I have just bumped PORTREVISION).

(from changelog)
2008.May.20
6.4	Change key mappings for WASD pattern.
	Add walk sideways left/right.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
